strengths: ~20 years of hands-on software experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput distributed systems, comfortably clearing the 15-year minimum.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial pattern: founded GISCollective, shipped multiple open-source libraries, and contributed to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq.
Active knowledge-sharer with public workshops, conference talks (FOSS4G), and teaching engagements, aligning with the role's internal/external inspiration mandate.
concerns: AI depth is recent and thin — meaningful AI/agent work spans only ~6 months (re:cinq, Apr–Oct 2025); the role demands recognized, demonstrated AI expertise at a strategic level.
No evidence of director-level scope: customer advisory, cross-org influence, or shaping product/platform strategy at scale — career arc stays squarely in senior/staff IC delivery work.
Currently in a career gap (Oct 2025–present) with no stated reason, which raises questions about readiness to step into a high-visibility principal role immediately.
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine breadth — two decades across stacks, real open-source ownership, and a recent toe-dip into AI tooling — but the role is a director-level IC position requiring deep, demonstrated AI expertise and a track record of strategic customer influence. His AI work is limited to a single short engagement, his career history shows no advisory or executive-stakeholder scope, and the active career gap adds uncertainty. He is a credible senior generalist with entrepreneurial instincts, but the gap between his current profile and the seniority and AI specialization this role demands is substantial.
